ddls:
CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_name" TEXT /* Name of the election */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  "early_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for early voting */,
  "early_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for early voting */,
  "absentee_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for absentee voting */,
  "absentee_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for absentee voting */,
  "provisional_voting_start_date" TEXT /* Start date for provisional voting */,
  "provisional_voting_end_date" TEXT /* End date for provisional voting */,
  "results_announced_date" TEXT /* Date when the election results were announced */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state where the county is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the county */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the county */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the state's total registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election in the county */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election in the county */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the county election office */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the precinct is located */,
  "voter_registration_count" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the precinct (e.g., polling place) */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the precinct */,
  "registered_voters_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the county's total registered voters */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election in the precinct */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election in the precinct */,
  "precinct_type" TEXT /* Type of precinct (e.g., urban, rural, suburban) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_precincts_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offices" (
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each office */,
  "office_name" TEXT /* Name of the office */,
  "office_type" TEXT /* Type of the office (e.g., federal, state, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the office */,
  "term_length" TEXT /* Length of the term for the office (e.g., 2 years, 4 years) */,
  "term_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the term starts */,
  "term_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the term ends */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Annual salary for the office holder */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_number" INTEGER /* Number of the district */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the district is associated with */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the district */,
  "geographic_area" REAL /* Geographic area of the district (e.g., square miles) */,
  "number_of_precincts" INTEGER /* Number of precincts in the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_districts_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the party was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the candidate belongs to */,
  "office_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the office the candidate is running for */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the district the candidate is running in */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the candidate */,
  "campaign_website" TEXT /* Official campaign website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links (e.g., Facebook, Twitter) */,
  "political_affiliation" TEXT /* Additional political affiliations (e.g., independent, progressive) */,
  "campaign_funding" INTEGER /* Total campaign funding */,
  "campaign_funding_source" TEXT /* JSON array of funding sources (e.g., individual donations, PACs) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_office_id FOREIGN KEY ("office_id") REFERENCES offices ("office_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the voting method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voting method */,
  "availability_dates" TEXT /* JSON array of dates when the voting method is available */,
  "voting_requirements" TEXT /* JSON array of requirements for the voting method (e.g., ID requirements) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the election */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the candidate */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes for the candidate in the precinct */,
  "absentee_by_mail" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast by absentee by mail */,
  "election_day" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast on election day */,
  "advance_in_person" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast in advance in person */,
  "provisional" INTEGER /* Number of provisional votes */,
  "voting_method_details" TEXT /* JSON array of detailed voting method counts (e.g., total absentee by mail, total provisional) */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the state */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the state */,
  "voter_turnout" INTEGER /* Total number of voters who participated in the election in the state */,
  "voter_turnout_percentage" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election in the state */,
  "state_population" INTEGER /* Population of the state */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voters" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter */,
  "voter_name" TEXT /* Name of the voter */,
  "voter_address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the county where the voter is registered */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the precinct where the voter is registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the voter */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the voter */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the voter */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the voter */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the voter */,
  "voting_history_json" TEXT /* JSON array of the voter's voting history */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voters_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voting_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voting record */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the voter cast their vote */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voting method used */,
  "voting_method_details" TEXT /* JSON array of detailed voting method information (e.g., time of day, location) */,
  "voter_verification_status" TEXT /* Status of the voter verification (e.g., verified, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES voting_methods ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voting_records_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voters ("voter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst, auditor) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity_date" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended, locked) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "trail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the change occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was changed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the change */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "change_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the change operation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
